items.notes: Active goals shell zero-state and recovery behavior now explicit in production path; legacy shell references normalized and guarded.
Readability and recovery flow changes in add/edit/detail surfaces were applied without navigation architecture changes.
Onboarding recovery now retains progress and retries; onboarding completion no longer commits on template-creation failure.
Family sharing + Settings copy, ordering, and state summaries now use user-facing sync/read-only language and maintain invitation/retry surfaces.
Family-sharing release-gate evidence remains required from docs/runbooks/family-sharing-release-gate.md; runtime evidence capture is planned for the next gated verification pass.

forbidden_changes: Broad UI architecture rewrites outside approved waves

decision_freeze.settings_shell: SettingsView as outer surface for Family Access and Local Bridge Sync
